chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 1102 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4587/023 3.For hearing of main case 08-08-2023 Both petitioners are present in person. Mr. Imran Mobeen, Assistant P.G for the State along with SIP-Abdul Ghafoor Mojai, I.O of Crime No.127 of 2023 of P.S. Site Area, Sukkur (respondent No.4). ****** Statements filed by respondents No.2 to 4 are taken on record and copy of which has been supplied to petitioners. Respondent No.4/I.O of Crime No.127 of 2023, registered at P.S, Site Area, Sukkur under Sections 452 & 365-B PPC is present and files copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Madiha (petitioner No.1) recorded under Section 161 CrPC and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Naimatullah (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, coercion or compulsion, but with her own accord and freewill and is leading a happy life with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She further stated that her maternal uncle (respondent No.5) has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted by anyone. I.O further states that he will file copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR. Both the petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of I.O do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of along with listed application with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
